figures.caption: Figure 2 – Left : Evolution of the score during the CMBEvolve search on the OoD task. Blue dots denote individual program evaluations, red crosses indicate failed runs, and the best-score trajectory traces the winning lineage; the labels mark the main code-level modifications along this path. Right : Recommended stability windows for each ACT DR6 pair type investigated by CosmoEvolve. Horizontal bars show the multipole ranges over which each pair type yields interpretable coherence diagnostics. The dashed and dotted vertical lines mark the reference cross-family and same-band scale cuts, at ℓ = 1200 and ℓ = 1500, respectively.
